title: Diabetes Glucose Control Study
inclusion_text: Patients aged 30 to 65 years with Type 2 Diabetes, HbA1c greater than 7.5, BMI between 22 and 35, currently on Metformin
exclusion_text: No prior insulin therapy, no cardiovascular disease, no pregnancy, creatinine above 1.5

title: Hypertension Management Trial
inclusion_text: Patients aged 40 to 70 years with Hypertension, currently on Lisinopril or Amlodipine
exclusion_text: No chronic kidney disease, no diabetes, no prior stroke

title: Breast Cancer Immunotherapy Study
inclusion_text: Female patients aged 25 to 60 years with Breast Cancer, no prior chemotherapy
exclusion_text: No metastatic disease, no pregnancy, no autoimmune disease

title: COPD Bronchodilator Efficacy Trial
inclusion_text: Patients aged 45 to 75 years with COPD, currently on Tiotropium or Salbutamol, BMI below 32
exclusion_text: No asthma, no active infection, no cardiovascular disease

title: Rheumatoid Arthritis Biologic Study
inclusion_text: Patients aged 20 to 65 years with Rheumatoid Arthritis, currently on Methotrexate
exclusion_text: No active tuberculosis, no pregnancy, no severe renal impairment

title: Depression SSRI Optimization Trial
inclusion_text: Patients aged 18 to 55 years with Depression, currently on Sertraline or Fluoxetine, BMI below 35
exclusion_text: No bipolar disorder, no active suicidal ideation, no substance abuse

title: Asthma Biologic Therapy Study
inclusion_text: Patients aged 18 to 60 years with Asthma, currently on Budesonide, HbA1c below 8.0
exclusion_text: No COPD, no active smoking, no cardiovascular disease

title: Chronic Kidney Disease Progression Study
inclusion_text: Patients aged 35 to 70 years with Chronic Kidney Disease, creatinine between 1.2 and 2.0, currently on Furosemide
exclusion_text: No dialysis, no diabetes, no active infection

title: Parkinson's Neuroprotection Trial
inclusion_text: Patients aged 50 to 80 years with Parkinson's Disease, currently on Levodopa or Pramipexole
exclusion_text: No dementia, no prior deep brain stimulation, no severe depression

title: Lupus Flare Prevention Study
inclusion_text: Patients aged 18 to 55 years with Lupus, currently on Hydroxychloroquine or Prednisone
exclusion_text: No active renal lupus, no pregnancy, no active infection

title: Type 2 Diabetes Weight Loss Study
inclusion_text: Patients aged 25 to 60 years with Type 2 Diabetes, BMI greater than 27, HbA1c between 7.0 and 10.0
exclusion_text: No prior bariatric surgery, no cardiovascular disease, no insulin therapy

title: Hypertension Renal Protection Trial
inclusion_text: Patients aged 45 to 75 years with Hypertension, creatinine below 1.5, currently on Losartan
exclusion_text: No diabetes, no prior heart attack, no severe liver disease

title: Asthma Transition Study
inclusion_text: Patients aged 18 to 35 years with Asthma, currently on Montelukast, BMI below 30
exclusion_text: No COPD, no active tuberculosis, no pregnancy

title: Depression Cognitive Therapy Study
inclusion_text: Patients aged 20 to 50 years with Depression, BMI below 32
exclusion_text: No schizophrenia, no active substance abuse, no bipolar disorder

title: COPD Pulmonary Rehabilitation Study
inclusion_text: Patients aged 50 to 80 years with COPD, BMI between 18 and 30, currently on Salbutamol
exclusion_text: No active cancer, no cardiovascular disease, no severe depression
